latin: Hoc totum diem facere possum. parvus vir a maioribus pulsabatur sed semper surgebat. numquam cessit. hoc totum diem facere possum, inquit.

questions.prompt: What does the small man keep doing?
questions.target: Getting back up after being knocked down
choices: Getting back up after being knocked down

questions.target: I can do this all day
choices: I can do this all day

translation: I can do this all day. The small man was being beaten by bigger ones but he always got up. He never yielded. I can do this all day, he said.
